subject: Political Science
overall_learning_objectives: Analyse the expected outcomes of democracy
Evaluate how democratic governments ensure accountability and transparency
Compare democratic and non-democratic systems in terms of development
Examine economic inequalities within democratic societies
Understand how democracy manages social diversity and conflict
Evaluate the role of democracy in promoting dignity and freedom
Develop critical thinking about the strengths and limitations of democratic governance

lesson_plan.title: Understanding Democratic Outcomes
topics_covered: Difference between democratic ideals and practice
student_activities: List expectations citizens have from democratic governments
Discuss whether these expectations are always fulfilled

lesson_plan.title: Accountable and Transparent Government
topics_covered: Role of elections and public debate
student_activities: Identify ways citizens can hold governments accountable
Discuss importance of transparency laws such as RTI

lesson_plan.title: Legitimacy and Public Support for Democracy
teaching_strategy: Use of charts and graphs from the chapter
student_activities: Interpret survey data on support for democracy
Discuss why people prefer democracy despite its weaknesses

lesson_plan.title: Democracy and Economic Development
student_activities: Compare growth rates between democratic and non-democratic countries

lesson_plan.title: Accommodation of Social Diversity
topics_covered: Role of democracy in resolving conflicts
student_activities: Discuss examples where democracy helped manage social conflicts
Debate on majority rule and minority protection

lesson_plan.title: Dignity, Freedom and Chapter Evaluation
topics_covered: Dignity and equality in democratic societies
Role of democracy in protecting rights
student_activities: Write examples of dignity and freedom in daily life

teaching_aids: Charts showing survey and inequality data
teacher_tip: Encourage students to connect theoretical ideas of democracy with current events and real-world political examples to deepen understanding.
